description:
You are a mobile build-pipeline maintainer.  
    A small configuration repository already exists at /home/user/ci.  
    Inside that directory you will find a file called pipeline.yml whose current
    contents are

        version: 1
        python_packages:
          - pytest==7.1.2

    1. Add the dependency “buildozer==1.5.0” to the python_packages list.  
       • Keep exactly two spaces of indentation before the dash, so the new line
         must read:  
           ␠␠- buildozer==1.5.0  
       • Do not change the order or wording of the existing pytest entry.  
       • When you are finished, the file should consist of the **three** lines
         shown in the expected state section of this task (see below).

    2. Install buildozer version 1.5.0 for the current user only (no sudo /
       administrative privileges).  Any standard method that leaves the package
       importable by the current Python interpreter is acceptable.

    3. Produce a short verification log at /home/user/ci/dependency_check.log
       containing exactly four lines, in the precise order below:

           Name: buildozer
           Version: 1.5.0
           Location: <path printed by “pip show buildozer”>
           Requires: <value printed by “pip show buildozer”>

       • “Name:” and “Version:” lines must match those strings literally.  
       • “Location:” must start with “Location: ” followed by the absolute path
         reported by pip.  
       • “Requires:” must start with “Requires: ” followed by whatever
         dependency list pip shows (it may be blank).  
       • End the file with a single newline.

    The automated checker will confirm:

    • /home/user/ci/pipeline.yml contains both dependency lines with the exact
      indentation and wording shown below.  
    • Python can successfully import buildozer (meaning your installation
      worked).  
    • /home/user/ci/dependency_check.log exists and its first two lines are
      exactly the ones shown above, while the remaining two lines begin with the
      correct “Location:” and “Requires:” prefixes.

    Expected final state of /home/user/ci/pipeline.yml:

        version: 1
        python_packages:
          - pytest==7.1.2
          - buildozer==1.5.0
truth:
<!-- Expected exact contents of /home/user/ci/pipeline.yml -->
    <file path="/home/user/ci/pipeline.yml"><![CDATA[
version: 1
python_packages:
  - pytest==7.1.2
  - buildozer==1.5.0
]]></file>

    <!--
        dependency_check.log must contain exactly four lines.
        Only the first two are checked for literal equality; the last two are
        verified by prefix so the absolute path can vary across environments.
    -->
    <log path="/home/user/ci/dependency_check.log">
        <line index="1">Name: buildozer</line>
        <line index="2">Version: 1.5.0</line>
        <line index="3" startswith="Location: "/>
        <line index="4" startswith="Requires: "/>
    </log>
name: task_000000_6fb185de
